value_chain_position: Crypto exchange infrastructure layer — operates a regulated digital-asset exchange and clearing platform selling trading rails and custody to institutional and retail crypto participants.
relative_comps: BLSH operates a regulated crypto exchange with institutional positioning, competing against COIN which dominates US retail and is far larger (~$60B mcap vs ~$4B). BLSH's 50% 3-year revenue CAGR is strong but YoY revenue is actually down 13%, suggesting a lumpy, volume-dependent model. FCF margin is nearly zero (0.02%), making it a thin-margin toll-taker versus CME/ICE which run 40%+ FCF margins. The thesis depends on institutional crypto volume normalizing upward and BLSH capturing wallet share from incumbents.
